# CTI Field Notes Demo (Chirpy)

This is a starter demo for a CTI-focused blog using Jekyll + Chirpy.

## Sections

- Home
- Infra Hunting
- APT Tracking
- Recent Attacks
- Labs
- About / Contact

## Run locally

```bash
bundle install
bundle exec jekyll serve
```

Visit `http://127.0.0.1:4000`.

## Write a new post

Create a Markdown file in `_posts`:

`YYYY-MM-DD-title.md`

Use categories to route content to section tabs:

- `infra-hunting`
- `apt-tracking`
- `recent-attacks`
- `labs`
